task_completion.description: Open the clustered_motors.ork design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is visible, and the title bar or loaded design indicates 'clustered_motors' is open.

task_completion.description: Configure the Inner tube with a D12 motor and Outer tubes with C6 motors
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Motors & Configuration' tab of OpenRocket, the motor list shows an Estes D12 assigned to the Inner tube and Estes C6 assigned to the Outer tubes.

task_completion.description: Set a 1.5-second ignition delay for the Outer tube motors
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the motor configuration settings, the ignition event for the Outer tube motors is set to a delay of exactly 1.5 seconds.

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation for the new configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab shows a completed simulation run for the new motor configuration, or a simulation plot/data window is open.

task_completion.description: Save the modified rocket design as airstart_cluster.ork
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'airstart_cluster.ork' in the rockets directory, or the OpenRocket window title updates to 'airstart_cluster.ork'.

task_completion.description: Export the simulation's time-series flight data to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export data' dialog in OpenRocket shows the destination path ending in 'airstart_flight_data.csv', or a file manager/terminal shows this file created in the exports directory.

task_completion.description: Write a summary report detailing maximum acceleration and apogee
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file named 'airstart_report.txt' that contains text explicitly stating the simulated maximum acceleration and apogee values.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to configure motors and run the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with OpenRocket's menus, configuration tabs, and simulation buttons, rather than just editing the .ork XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The values in the summary report match the actual simulation results
integrity.visual_evidence: The maximum acceleration and apogee values typed into the report should correspond to the results displayed in the OpenRocket simulation tab or plot.

integrity.description: The CSV and ORK files were generated via OpenRocket, not manually created with dummy content
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using OpenRocket's 'Save As' and 'Export' features rather than using 'touch' or a text editor to create empty/fake files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Central motor must be D12. Outboard motors must be C6. Outboard ignition delay must be exactly 1.5 seconds. Target ORK path: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/airstart_cluster.ork. CSV path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/airstart_flight_data.csv. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/airstart_report.txt.
